caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt is also visible behind him. On the screen, there are logos in the lower corners, including one that reads "HOT" and another that says "HOTLY TOT." Across the sequence, the man is speaking and shifting his gaze. He begins by looking slightly to his left, then centers his gaze forward, and finally looks back toward his left while continuing to talk, with subtle changes in his facial expressions and mouth movements throughout the frames.
